title: thelypteris pleiophylla
intro: Thelypteris pleiophylla is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Thelypteris pleiophylla is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
